full_text:
Zhang Dang ејөз•¶
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Dang (ејөз•¶). Corrupt and sycophantic, he implicated Cao Shuang and others as traitors and was executed by Sima Yi. Zhang Dang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
